---
name: RFC — propose a spec change
about: Propose a change to the libtracer wire protocol
labels: rfc
---

## Summary

One paragraph: what are you proposing and why?

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case is currently impossible or awkward?

## Proposed change

The concrete change to the spec. Be specific about wire format if applicable.

## Compatibility

- Does this break v1 implementations? (If yes, this requires v2.)
- Does this require new conformance vectors?
- How should existing implementations migrate?

## Alternatives considered

What did you reject and why?

## Discussion

Per [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md), this issue stays open at least 14 days for implementer feedback before a PR is merged.
